case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS NEXSYS ELECTRONIC INC - PETER KILLCOMMON-OWNER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,457.13 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT NEXSYS ELECTRONIC INC - PETER KILLCOMMON-OWNER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEXSYS ELECTRONIC INC - PETER KILLCOMMON-OWNER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEXSYS ELECTRONIC INC - PETER KILLCOMMON-OWNER $1,457.13 PRINCIPAL, $14.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,471.92 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NEXSYS ELECTRONIC INC - PETER KILLCOMMON-OWNER
